zh.Sandhill Manor, Fordingbridge, Hampshire: 英國英格蘭哈普爾福丁布利其
zh.Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾艾尤爾梅

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Moleyns於1405年12月8日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯時，他的父親William Moleyns27歲，母親Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens24歲。他於1423年5月1日與Anne Whalesborough在英國奧可福爾艾尤爾梅結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1429年登記服兵役。他去世於1429年5月8日在法國奧爾萊納薩奧爾萊安斯享年23歲，埋葬在法國奧爾萊納薩奧爾萊安斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Moleyns于1405年12月8日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯时，他的父亲William Moleyns27岁，母亲Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens24岁。他于1423年5月1日与Anne Whalesborough在英国奧可福爾艾尤爾梅结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1429年登记服兵役。他去世于1429年5月8日在法国奧爾萊納薩奧爾萊安斯享年23岁，埋葬在法国奧爾萊納薩奧爾萊安斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Moleyns was born on 8 December 1405, in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, William Moleyns, was 27 and his mother, Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens, was 24. He married Anne Whalesborough on 1 May 1423, in Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1429. He died on 8 May 1429, in Orléans, Orléanais, France, at the age of 23, and was buried in Orléans, Orléanais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Moleyns est né le 8 décembre 1405, à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Moleyns, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Anne Whalesborough le 1 mai 1423, à Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1429. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1429, à Orléans, Orléanais, France, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterré à Orléans, Orléanais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Moleyns am 8. Dezember 1405 in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Moleyns 27 und seine Mutter Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens 24. Er hat am 1. Mai 1423 in Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England Anne Whalesborough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1429 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 8. Mai 1429 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Orléans, Orléanais, Frankreich und wurde in Orléans, Orléanais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Moleyns è nato il il 8 dicembre 1405 nel Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, William Moleyns, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Anne Whalesborough il 1 maggio 1423, nel Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1429. Morì il 8 maggio 1429, nel Orléans, Orléanais, Francia, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolto a Orléans, Orléanais, Francia.

ja.Sandhill Manor, Fordingbridge, Hampshire: イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアフォーディングブリッジ
ja.Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエウエルメ
ja.Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズ
ja.Orléans, Orléanais, France: フランスオルルeアナイスオルルeアンス
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Moleynsが1405年12月8日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズで生まれた時，父William Moleynsは27歳，母Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylensは24歳であった。1423年5月1日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエウエルメでAnne Whalesboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1429年に兵役登録をした。彼は1429年5月8日にフランスオルルeアナイスオルルeアンスで23歳で死去し，フランスオルルeアナイスオルルeアンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Moleyns(이)가 1405년 12월 8일 영국 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Moleyns(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1423년 5월 1일 영국 스퍼드실르 웰에서 Anne Whalesborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1429년 5월 8일 프랑스 올를e아나이 올를e아스에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 올를e아나이 올를e아스에 묻혔다.

mn.8 December 1405–8 May 1429: 1405 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 8–1429 оны Тавдугаар сарын 8
mn.Sandhill Manor, Fordingbridge, Hampshire: Fordingbridge, Hāmtūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.8 December 1405–8 May 1429: 8 de dezembro de 1405–8 de maio de 1429
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Moleyns nasceu em 8 de dezembro de 1405, em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Moleyns, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Whalesborough em 1 de maio de 1423, em Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1429. Ele faleceu em 8 de maio de 1429, em Orléans, Orléanais, França, com 23 anos, e foi sepultado em Orléans, Orléanais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Moleyns родился 8 декабря 1405 г. в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Moleyns было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Whalesborough 1 мая 1423 г. в местности ювелм, оксфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1429 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 8 мая 1429 г. в местности орлeанс, орлeанеи, Франция в возрасте 23 лет и был похоронен в местности орлeанс, орлeанеи, Франция.

es.8 December 1405–8 May 1429: 8 de diciembre de 1405–8 de mayo de 1429
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Moleyns nació el 8 de diciembre de 1405, en Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Moleyns, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Anne Whalesborough el 1 de mayo de 1423, en Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1429. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1429, en Orléans, Orléanais, Francia, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultado en Orléans, Orléanais, Francia.
